responsibilities: Participate in the entire application lifecycle, focusing on coding and debugging.
Design and develop Microservices systems with Python, Node.js, React, SQL, etc.
Gather and address technical and design requirements
Perform UI tests to optimize performance
Plan, create and execute test cases applicable to user stories to ensure coverage for AExeo products
Develop solutions that are scalable, high performing, maintainable and meet high quality standards
Participate in peer reviews of code to ensure adherence to development standards
Build reusable code and libraries for future use
Participate and contribute on all team activities such as sprint planning, daily scrums and retrospectives
Work closely with members of the Architecture and DevOps teams
Communicate and provide updates on assigned tasks while taking ownership of assigned tasks
